reason: Check that implementation preserves AgentRun/session architecture boundaries.
Check that implementation matches mailbox envelope, scheduler, barrier/drain, hook convergence, recovery, and naming contracts.
Check that runtime execution state projection and AgentRun mailbox command surface stay aligned.
Check that API responses and frontend projections stay contract-first and typed.
Check that frontend command state handling avoids untyped branching and duplicate local truth.
Check that frontend continues to consume backend command/mailbox projections instead of deriving runtime state locally.
Check that AgentRun workspace identity remains the command owner and runtime session remains a delivery ref.
Check that all cut-over gates are satisfied and old production authority paths are removed.
